title: Mythic Armory RP
description: Textures for my Mythic Armory Datapack
body:
# ⚔️ Mythic Armory — Resource Pack

The official resource pack companion for the Mythic Armory datapack.

This pack brings the five new armor sets from Mythic Armory to life with custom textures and models. Without it, the armors will render as their vanilla base — install this alongside the datapack for the full experience.

🛡️ Included Armor Sets
SetTheme
🟢 Emerald
Lush, gem-forged protection

🟣 Amethyst
Crystalline arcane plating

⚪ Platinum
Sleek, refined heavy armor

🖤 Enderite
Forged from the void itself

🌑 Oblivara
Ancient armor of forgotten power

## 📦 Installation

Download both the datapack and this resource pack
Place the datapack in your world's datapacks folder
Place the resource pack in your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder
Enable the resource pack in-game before loading your world


⚠️ Requires the Mythic Armory datapack to function. The resource pack alone adds no gameplay content.


🔗 Links

📥 [Mythic Armory Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mythic-armory) — get the gameplay half here
